jobs.prompt: dark cyberpunk religious horror theme, slow tempo, distorted church organ, sub bass drone, glitch choir, metallic percussion, ominous but beautiful, seamless loop feeling, no famous artist imitation
low dark cathedral ambience, distant synthetic choir, server hum, soft electric crackle, ritual dread, seamless background loop, no lead melody
abstract digital abyss ambience, granular synth drones, underwater data pulses, distant modem shrieks, slow heartbeat bass, seamless loop
final act eldritch AI horror ambience, broken choir, corrupted organ, black metal drones without drums, unstable divine error, seamless loop
short horrifying bad ending music sting, distorted choir hit, metallic slam, glitch static decay, 5 seconds
strange hopeful cyberpunk sacred ending theme, gentle organ, soft synthetic choir, warm noise, unresolved mercy, 60 seconds
short dry retro UI click, subtle static
soft neon hover blip, cyberpunk terminal
brief sacred revelation sting, choir swell, glitch shimmer, 4 seconds
violent digital death glitch, distorted zap, static burst, 3 seconds
small holy relic pickup chime, glass bell, soft digital sparkle
quiet CRT static and server room tone, seamless loop
